positive: A stylized celestial map overlaying abstract cosmic geometry. The central subject is a stylized, glowing crescent moon encircled by minimalist, interconnected constellations (Orion, Pleiades, etc.) rendered in fine white line art. Elements include stylized planetary orbits, abstract nebula swirls, and geometric sacred patterns (mandala influence). The overall composition must be perfectly symmetrical, featuring a clean, high-contrast silhouette against a deep midnight blue or black background. Use a vibrant, yet muted, palette of electric blues, cosmic purples, and gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Deco poster design and fine scientific illustration, vectorized and scalable for apparel printing. Focus on clean, solid color shapes and sharp edges, giving it a retro-futuristic, mystical, and highly graphic appearance. Perfect for a central, repeat-tileable print.
negative: low resolution, blurry, grain, noise, text, watermark, signature, cartoon, sketch, poorly drawn, deformed, messy, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy
